title: ctenitis subincisa
intro: Ctenitis subincisa, a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, is a type of fern native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis subincisa include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Ctenitis subincisa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
